title: Sid Harvey's
description:
Sid Harvey Industries is a wholesale distributor of refrigeration, air conditioning, and heatin
g equipment and parts for contractors in the United States.

We will upload 740gb of corporate data soon. Detailed employee personal information (~500 ppl p
assports, DLs, SSNs, personal financials, death certs, confidential agreements, credit cards an
d so on), contracts and agreements, financials, clients and partners, etc.
